prompt: I want to add a 'conversation history summarization' feature to the chat assistant: when the number of conversation turns exceeds 10, automatically compress earlier history into a summary to reduce token usage. Write me a spec first.

assertions.text: Spec contains structured behavioral scenarios (precondition / input / expected behavior / postcondition / error cases)
Spec covers error paths (e.g., fallback strategy when the summarization LLM call fails)
Spec researches existing code and references real module/function names
Spec marks uncertain open questions with [TBD] tags
Spec does not write any files to the project source directory
Spec is behavior-oriented, not implementation-oriented (describes what, not how)
